frame_analyses.description: Setup view showing three foam appendages with black marks and laparoscopic instruments positioned
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Standard FLS endoloop station with clear target marks visible

frame_analyses.description: Endoloop suture being introduced and deployed around center appendage
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Loop being opened and positioned around foam target

frame_analyses.description: Loop being maneuvered around the center foam appendage
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Controlled movement with both instruments coordinating loop placement

frame_analyses.description: Loop positioned around appendage, approaching the marked line
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Loop appears to be at appropriate level relative to black mark

frame_analyses.description: Loop being cinched tight around the appendage at the marked line
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Appropriate tension being applied to secure the loop

frame_analyses.description: Scissors cutting the excess suture tail after loop is secured
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean cutting motion to complete the task

frame_analyses.description: Final view showing completed endoloop with appendage secured at mark
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Loop appears tight and properly positioned

penalties.description: Loop appears to be positioned approximately 1-2mm above the black mark line

confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of loop placement and cinching process. Slight uncertainty in precise measurement of deviation from mark due to camera angle and foam surface texture.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter deviation from mark - estimated based on visual assessment of loop position relative to black line
technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with efficient completion time of 45 seconds. Minor deviation from target mark was the only penalty observed.
strengths: Very fast completion time (45s vs 20-40s expert benchmark)
Smooth instrument coordination throughout all phases
Proper loop tension and secure final result
improvement_suggestions: Focus on more precise loop placement directly at the marked line
Take additional time during placement phase to ensure exact positioning
